metadata.evaluation_name: MVT-RAG vs Baselines F1 & Efficiency Eval
metadata.verdict_reason: MVT-RAG shows partial success: F1=0.214 vs top-k-5 F1=0.191, chunks=1.2 vs 5.0. Multi-hop: MVT=0.138 vs topk5=0.236. G_env ablation delta=-0.0345.
